user.title: FoxESS Cloud
user.description: Enter your FoxESS OpenAPI key and device serial number.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to FoxESS Cloud.
error.device_not_found: Device not found. Check serial number.

abort.yaml_in_use: This integration is configured via YAML. Remove the sensor platform entry from configuration.yaml first.

data_unavailable.title: FoxESS inverter data unavailable for {hours}+ hours
data_unavailable.description:
The inverter **{device_sn}** has not reported data for over {hours} hours during its expected operating window.

Check that the WiFi datalogger is connected and able to reach the FoxESS cloud. If using a local relay, verify the DNAT rule is correctly configured.
